title: dryopteris ternata
intro: Dryopteris ternata, also known as the Autumn Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the fern family (Dryopteridaceae). This plant is native to East Asia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris ternata include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and improving digestion, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and high blood pressure. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine.
